# Local Development

<div className="docs-hero">
  <div className="docs-hero__row">
    <div>
      <div className="docs-hero__eyebrow">environment</div>
      <h1>Run the full stack locally</h1>
      <p>
        Iris runs as two processes locally: a Vite frontend on port 3000 and a
        FastAPI backend on port 8000. Both read from a shared .env at the repo root.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Environment Setup

### Prerequisites

- Docker and Docker Compose
- Python 3.10+
- Node.js 18+

### Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/stephenhungg/iris.git
cd iris
```

### Install dependencies

```bash
# Backend
pip install -r backend/requirements.txt

# Frontend
npm install --prefix frontend
```

### Configure environment variables

Create a `.env` file in the root of the repository. This file will hold your API keys and other configuration.

```ini
# Example .env file
OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."
GEMINI_API_KEY="AIza..."
VEO_API_KEY="AIza..."

# Optional: Override the default Veo model for video generation.
# Defaults to "veo-3.1-fast-generate-preview" for free-tier compatibility.
# Set to "veo-3.1-generate-preview" for higher quality (requires paid plan).
# VEO_MODEL="veo-3.1-generate-preview"

# Database configuration (for local development, SQLite is often sufficient)
DATABASE_URL="sqlite:///./iris.db"
```

## Running the Stack

### Start the backend

```bash
cd backend
uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
```

### Start the frontend

```bash
cd frontend
npm run dev
```

The frontend will be available at `http://localhost:3000`.

## Local Workflow

### Making changes

- **Backend:** Changes to Python files in `backend/` will trigger a reload of the Uvicorn server.
- **Frontend:** Changes to React files in `frontend/` will trigger a hot module reload in your browser.

### Database migrations

If you make changes to database models, you'll need to run migrations:

```bash
# From the backend directory
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "Your migration message"
alembic upgrade head
```

## Testing

### Backend tests

```bash
# From the backend directory
pytest
```

### Frontend tests

```bash
# From the frontend directory
npm test
```
